name: vera
description: Vera — payment service: vault (PAN tokenisation) + OBO ARQC + provider orchestration. Exposes an HTTP vault-register endpoint that Palisade calls at card-issue time.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n pay,vault,admin,pay-ui,admin-ui -c blue,yellow,green,blue.dim,green.dim "npm run dev -w services/pay" "npm run dev -w services/vault" "npm run dev -w services/admin" "npm run dev -w @vera/pay-frontend" "npm run dev -w @vera/admin-frontend"
